name: PokemonMaster
description:
It's your chance to be a Pokémon Trainer in this vast Pokémon World.

A chance to meet all trainers, battle with their Pokémon, earn badges, beat the elite four and participate in Pokémon League, that includes all the Region and Islands.

You can train your own Pokémon, collect all Pokémon, explore all the regions and have a wide variety of adventures.
